leadText: Icepeak Arena (Japanese: 氷山の戦場 Iceberg Battlefield) is an area located in the western region of the Alabaster Icelands of Hisui. It is located south of Snowfall Hot Spring and north of Arena's Approach. It is the place where the noble Avalugg, Lord of the Tundra (Japanese: 雪原キング King of the Snowfield), resides. Avalugg is fought here as part of Mission 12: "The Slumbering Lord of the Tundra" to calm him of his frenzy. Warden Gaeric of the Pearl Clan tends to Avalugg here. During the cutscene before Lord Avalugg's initial battle, it is revealed that his body actually constitutes part of the surface of the arena.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The Icepeak Arena takes up a surface at the top of a snowy plateau, which can be reached from the sloping Arena's Approach that snakes around the edge of the arena. A trapezoidal platform is found at the end of the slope trail, which the player stands on during the battle against the frenzied Avalugg. When battling Avalugg, he emerges completely from beneath the snow of the arena.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Snow Balm Obtained prior to battling Avalugg LA Icicle Plate Given by Avalugg after quelling its frenzy during Mission 12: "The Slumbering Lord of the Tundra" LA Exp. Candy M ×4 Given by Gaeric after defeating Avalugg in a rematch LA Grit Pebble ×3 Given by Gaeric after defeating Avalugg in a rematch without taking damage LA
